result.stdout:
USAGE:
    MauiCheck.dll check [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                      Prints help information
    -m, --manifest <FILE_OR_URL>                           
    -f, --fix                                              
    -n, --non-interactive                                  
    -s, --skip <CHECKUP_ID>                                
    -d, --pre                                              
        --main                                             
        --dotnet <SDK_ROOT>                                
        --force-dotnet                                     
    -v, --verbose                                          
        --ci                                               
    -l, --logfile <PATH>

commands.payload:
USAGE:
    MauiCheck.dll check [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                      Prints help information
    -m, --manifest <FILE_OR_URL>                           
    -f, --fix

    -s, --skip <CHECKUP_ID>                                
    -d, --pre                                              
        --main                                             
        --dotnet <SDK_ROOT>                                
        --force-dotnet                                     
    -v, --verbose                                          
        --ci                                               
    -l, --logfile <PATH>
